title: ProSlide Aluminum Bed Organizer Drawer System
description_html:
Keep your truck bed organized with the ProSlide heavy-duty aluminum drawer system. Built from aircraft-grade aluminum, this bed organizer slides smoothly on precision-machined rails and locks securely to prevent gear from shifting on the trail or job site.

Holds up to 400 lbs. Weatherproof seal. Tool-free installation. Available in 5-foot and 6-foot bed configurations.
